channel.title: AzRoleWatcher
channel.description: Continuously monitor roles and permissions in Microsoft Entra ID and Azure.

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Graph app permission
item.description:
Id: 60f8cea0-2476-45c9-ab18-70e79e60ad14
Display name: Group.ManageProtection.All
Description: Manage the Microsoft Information Protection (MIP) label for M365 and security groups.
Link: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/directoryRoleTemplates/60f8cea0-2476-45c9-ab18-70e79e60ad14

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Graph app permission
item.description:
Id: 8fc84b9a-5c21-479b-ba9d-02d252d062aa
Display name: Policy.Read.CrossTenantAccess
Description: Read your organization's cross tenant access policies
Link: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/directoryRoleTemplates/8fc84b9a-5c21-479b-ba9d-02d252d062aa

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Graph app permission
item.description:
Id: faa08cc0-0dcd-4ea9-9f9c-8b16f842b36e
Display name: RemoteTenantGroups.Read.All
Description: Read RemoteTenantGroups information
Link: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/directoryRoleTemplates/faa08cc0-0dcd-4ea9-9f9c-8b16f842b36e
